title: Shakeitup The Improvised Shakespeare Show
company: a rotating cast of actors including:
genre: Epic History, Romantic Comedy, or Gruesome Tragedy! Pen your wittiest Shakespearean line for our brave actors to pull from their suitably-Shakespearean breeches when they need a helping hand – the twist? They’ll have no idea what the line will be before they say it!
description: Each show will be performed by a rotating cast of actors including:Joseph PrestwichDexter SouthernMadeline HattRose TrustmanFred Di RosaAbby FormanJames AlstonOlivia Gibbs-FairleyBecky Gibbs
content_warnings: We cannot predict exactly what will happen in our shows, but expect to see anything you find in Shakespeare's plays, which may include depictions of death and suicide

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex
